zh.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton是Robert Harington的兒子，於1360年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。他於1374年與Agnes Fleet在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年在英國英格蘭戴文艾可頓享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harington,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Knight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Exton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Exton (Devon, Somerset, Rutland, and Hampshire). The first and second derive their name from the Celtic river name Exe, while the place in Hampshire, recorded in 940 as East Seaxnatune, comes from Old English Ēastseaxe ‘East Saxons’. The Rutland placename is derived from Old English oxa ‘oxen’. In each case, the final element is Old English tūn ‘settlement, enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton was born in 1360, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert Harington. He married Agnes Fleet in 1374, in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1421, in Exton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton est né en 1360, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert Harington. Il a épousé Agnes Fleet en 1374, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1421, à Exton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton wurde 1360 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Robert Harington geboren. Er hat 1374 in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom Agnes Fleet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1421 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Exton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton è nato il nel 1360 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Robert Harington. Lui sposato Agnes Fleet nel 1374, nel Exton, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1421, nel Exton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Extonは1360年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでRobert Haringtonの息子として生まれた。1374年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエクストンでAgnes Fleetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年にイギリスイギリスデボンエクストンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton(은)는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Robert Harington의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 스턴에서 Agnes Fleet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton nasceu em 1360, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Robert Harington. Ele casou-se com Agnes Fleet em 1374, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1421, em Exton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton родился в 1360 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Robert Harington. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Fleet в 1374 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1421 г. в местности экстон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: John de Harington, Knight of Exton nació en 1360, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Robert Harington. Se casó con Agnes Fleet en 1374, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1421, en Exton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
